template:
Load the auto-dev skill with skill(name="auto-dev") and activate the workflow. Arguments: $ARGUMENTS

Follow the skill instructions precisely:
1. This skill is explicit-invoke only and high-authority (it self-merges and self-deploys). Ask for one-time session consent before activating.
2. Once confirmed, apply the auto-dev methodology to every PR in this session:
   - Two independent review passes (both yours) before any merge
   - Monitor all CI pipelines in background agents via a single blocking `gh pr checks --watch` (never block the main thread)
   - Triage every review comment from any reviewer (CodeRabbit, other review bots, and human reviewers alike), fix the ones that need it, then reply to AND resolve every thread via GitHub GraphQL (regardless of fix). No human approval is required — only that comments are verified and relevant ones fixed.
   - Merge synchronously yourself via gh CLI (apps or infra) when all gates are green — no --auto
   - For infra repos, trigger deployment via workflow_dispatch (infra does not deploy on push to main), then monitor it
   - Monitor post-merge and deployment pipelines in background; fix-forward on failures (max 5 cycles, circuit-breaker on repeated identical failures)
3. Re-ask for confirmation before merging if the consent exchange was lost to context compaction.
4. Never ask for consent again after the first confirmation in this session.
description: Autonomous PR development (high-authority: self-merges + self-deploys). Two review passes, background CI monitoring, reply+resolve every review thread from any reviewer (bots like CodeRabbit and humans alike), self-merge when green, post-merge/deployment monitoring with capped fix-forward iteration.
